harnesses.name: veritas-research
harnesses.description: Pure 8-plane template harness — runnable reference implementation. Extend by registering Loadouts and Tools; no domain logic here.

harnesses.name: veritas-example
harnesses.description: Research domain harness — demonstrates end-to-end Veritas usage with ingest, RSI, loadouts (codebase-audit, research, web-recon), and bench suites.

harnesses.name: solo-hackathon
harnesses.description: Harness #3 — generated from HarnessSpec "solo-hackathon" (H-4). Assists single-person hackathons.
